top_signals.title: Hong Kong Dollar Nears Weak End on Low Volatility, Cheap Rates
top_signals.summary: The Hong Kong dollar is heading toward the weak end of its fixed trading range as multi-year low volatility and cheap borrowing costs make it easier for traders to short the currency against the greenback.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Yen At Historic Low Set to Hand Japan Carmakers $5.8 Billion
top_signals.summary: Even as Japan seeks to put the brakes on the yen’s slide to a 40-year low, the weak currency could land the country’s carmakers a $5.8 billion profit windfall this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
